review_title: The WoW moment of AppDy
description: Appdynamics was wonderful and the wow moment in our environment
author: peter A.
pros: Appdynamics is a great 360 view tool to use for any application environment. I like the application, server and even the network flow monitoring of the application. My best part of the application feature is it drill down capability in determine root cause of an issue.
cons: The setup is not ease and requires a lot of expertise. I also do not like the the fact that every component is billed or must purchase license to use.
author_profession: IT Asset and Configuration Analyst, Service Catalog and Knowledge Manager

review_title: Easy-to-use and powerful monitoring tool
description: Overall AppDynamics is very helpful in tracing all the transactions of your application, in creating astounding dashboard with various metrics and in reducing your MTTR when there are issues.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great tool to monitor applications, very powerful in tracing transactions and monitoring all the most important metrics.
cons: Can be sometimes difficult to write custom queries for specific in-depth analysis, because it uses its own query language. Some features are quite pricey.

review_title: Losing the shine
description: AppD used to be our niche Observability platform for on-prem and traditional tech stacks. But with the advancements around SaaS, cloud native and GenAI based applications, we have found AppD lagging behind as compared to other popular monitoring platforms.
author: Vaibhav S.
pros: The Application flow map in AppDynamics showing live business interactions between applications tiers is simply outstanding. No hidden costs and does what says on the tin for the procured licenses. Robust monitoring for traditional tech stacks.
cons: Slow product development pipeline, it takes ages for Cisco to come up with modules for enabling monitoring for modern SaaS and cloud native applications. No tagging support. Loose integration with AIOPS platforms.

review_title: AppDynamics - why to choose it
description: I was able to keep monitoring the performance of a complex ecosystem. Thanks to the product I have a clear vision of the full architecture including the communication/flow between different services part of the solution. With the alert notification, I am able to keep monitoring the performance of the system (I can immediately understand if something is going bad after a delivery for example) and the error. Moreover I can check the status of the servers running the solution.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The possibility to go into detail in case of error. You can arrive to the line of code having the issue. At the same time, in case of bad performance, you are able to know what was happening at that moment. I would add also the alert section, it helps you to trigger alarm when it is needed. That may be fantastic for the team managing the operation / support h24. This team may be also helped by the dashboard that the users of AppDyn can create.
cons: Setup of the Agent - there are other products doing better this part (the concept of OneAgent available for example in Dynatrace). Setup complex in case of SAP ecosystem. Real User Monitoring - the products specialized on this topic (doing only this) are better than AppDynamics. At the same time, with AppDyn you can have the monitoring end to end (from the final users to the specific server)

review_title: Expensive but will save me time this weekend
description: AppDynamics allows us to determine why the micro services are failing before we get bombarded by customer complaints on Twitter. It follows the path of the request so I don't have to sift through millions of log files.
author: John K.
pros: I thought the tall would bring all of our legacy systems down but it did not. I like that our tech support group receive email back without needing to press the answer on this but it is also a plus if the agent can identify themselves and I don't have to do it.
cons: My biggest complaint with the cost is that my manager is constantly complaining about the bill we get each month. I specifically complain about the alerting profiles where if I want to remove an individual object from a zone I can't just unselect it. I have to select every other object individually which is tedious and inane.

review_title: AppDynamics is the best at testing your App's UI Responsiveness
description: I use it for testing my app, to get a handle on what the end user experience will be. Must avoid end user getting frustrated by waiting to long for results, want highly responsive user interface.
author: Wes P.
pros: It's the best at monitoring end to end performance of your app, and therefore it can identify problem locations no matter what part of the stack they pop up in.
cons: It can take a large investment of time to setup, many pieces are complex and difficult to understand. The price is steep compared to the competition.

review_title: A very useful tool to manage and determine Apps performance
description: The platform is very useful to obtain and verify SLA for Customer Service when using web and Mobile Applications.
author: Alejandra T.
pros: With this software we can have a full evaluation of Applications Performance and quickly determine and fix problems, having an end-to-end trace.
cons: At first, we rely on our people for troubleshooting, and we had delays. Now, we are using an experienced partner and everything works really fine.
author_profession: BU Hybrid IT Regional Sales Manager

review_title: Best tool Monitor Application Performance and troubleshooting the Application issues
description: AppDynamics is best application performance monitoring tool. It has best GUI , We can easy visualize all things on dashboard. We can monitor cpu utilization, memory utilization and Disk I/O.
author: vikram S.
pros: It is very easy to install and integrate with application. It will monitor application API, database and server. We can set alert and email notifications. Also we can trigger script or specific action based on requirements. It is best monitoring tool available in market. It will help to troubleshoot application issue. We can collect all thread dump and analyze to find put application performance issue.
cons: I haven't found any issue yet. It is working preety well.

review_title: One of the best Application performance monitoring tools
description: Awesome product to analyse transactions
author: Satish C.
pros: Easy to drill down to ground zero, helps in faster triage of transaction failures.
cons: A little complex for novice users. Too many steps to follow

review_title: This tool is amazing in terms of performance bottleneck analysis and user friendliness
description: Integration with load runner
author: sonal J.
pros: The good thing about the tools is its integration with the load runner tool for performance testing We can get the exact method and class names from the code which helps in finding the bottleneck
cons: Some flex calls cannot be captured with the appdynamics so cannot be used for the flex coded developed applications. Extra license cost for the database monitoring can be more structured

review_title: AppDynamics has saved us so much time!
description: It's not the easiest APM out there to use by far. And manually instrumenting non-web software is the pits. But it pays off in droves. We've cut support times by 80%+. Before when we had issues, it involved a lot of trial and error, randomly looking at diff server logs, and manual hunting for problems. Now we know right where to start, and most of the time, even know what exactly is causing the issue. Root cause analysis is quick and easy. Database traces, full cross-app traces, it's all there now and it works amazingly. Now they just need to make it easier to use, because anyone outside of IT is instantly lost.
author: Zachary W.
pros: Deep, useful analysis of performance of applications. Makes for quick troubleshooting.
cons: It's not user friendly at all. And instrumentation of non-web apps is a slow painful process.

review_title: AppDyanamics review from T-Mobile employee
description: Overall it's above average.
author: Md Muhibbul C.
pros: All app and machine agents can be viewed. We can create dashboards as well for all server performances that gives us overview of how quickly we can identify issues.
cons: User Interface. Not very user friendly. In addition, sometimes user interface respond slowly.

review_title: Utilize AppDynamics to monitoring PROD Java applications
description: Able to see JVM memory usage, garbage collection, JVM error, and applications error per tier to associated systems.
author: Gavin L.
pros: Easy to install, configure, and manage. Just straight agent that you need to install on your systems and add it as part of your JVM process.
cons: Nothing to do not like it. Sometimes could be difficult to troubleshoot it if they agent cannot start with JVM process.

review_title: Technical Review
description: Overall I am satisfied with the applications ability to provide insights of our Application from top to bottom means code to database.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like monitoring fuctionality most. For example Database Monitoring, User Experience Monitoring, Performance Monitoring.
cons: We may need extra training to use it effectively as it is not simple to use.

review_title: a robust application performance monitoring tool
description: My experience with it has been generally positive, especially in terms of real-time monitoring, root cause analysis, and integration with various cloud and on-premises environments.
author: Philip Y.
pros: Cloud app service monitoring and SQL DB performance troubleshooting feature
cons: Initial deployment and fine-tuning can be time-consuming, especially in large or hybrid environments.

review_title: Great tool to view node wise details while performing the performance testing
description: It’s a great tool to view each node cpu, memory utilization and remaining details on each calls while performing the performance testing
author: Venkateswarlu D.
pros: In AppDynamics, we can collaborate with AWS related resources to view in detail usage of memory, cpu of each nodes
cons: Little bit when we are setting up AppDynamics connection initially
author_profession: Sr Software Development in Test and Performance Test Engineer

review_title: Emerging and must deploy tool in the APM world
description: Fantastic , no one say no to this tool, must deploy tool
author: Vikas J.
pros: Real time instrumentation with complete drill down analysis for all the transaction our app makes. This tools makes life easy for not only developer, but Performance engineers, PS and ops team . Single tool for everything
cons: Customization of alerts and suppression is tricky. No access to get AppD DB for capturing specific things. Scenario - I want my URL or API to be send in the app d alert but there is no provisioning , i raised ticket as well, but so far no provision. By clicking on errorneous BT and opening in appd resulterd in the errorneous API which is sometime time taking process.

review_title: AppDynamics - Monitor your traffic
description: I have been using AppD for little over a year now. It shows a great map of servers and databases, provide your the flow from where the transaction traffic is moving to which side. Provides periodic details on server health, disk usage, memory leak, Network and Disk I/O, CPU utilization etc. It generates logs to very minute level, which makes things hassle free when it comes to RCA an issue. It also keeps you up to date with respect to the top process classes which are consuming CPU and Memory. It is one of the best application monitoring tool. Highly recommended.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Real time monitoring of your servers, databases. 2. Provide in depth details on which process classes are consuming the memory. 3. Continuous alerts on servers and data bases. 4. Transaction trace. 5. Server Health, Disk Usage, Network I/O, Disk I/O. 6. Server logs available to RCA issues. 7. Transaction and Traffic reports can be customized as per need basis. 8. Best part is the Map Flow.
cons: Nothing much to add except the cost. Its a little expensive.

review_title: Application Monitoring and Management
description: AppD can monitor all kinds of applications, it provides real time user traffic details on the applications and how much data is being fetched, what is the server capacity, provides over the period statistics about user load which helps us adding extra servers on the busiest days of the weeks helping end customers with more reliable and efficient service with respect to response time. It also provides details on the very minute level which helps with debugging of issues on production and many issues can be resolved without involving L2 or L3 support. It requires a little learning curve in the beginning but it has a very user friendly dash board and things gets easy when you have spent ample amount of time on this application. It is less cost effective but given the use of it, I would highly recommend Appdynamics to other businesses out there.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Appdynamics, is a great application monitoring and management tool. It can monitor any application, server or database. It provides user traffic details, servers capacity, response time in real time. It helps resolves more than 90 % of server side issues by checking the appdynamics reports as it provides in depth details to the strategy calls.
cons: Needs a little bit of learning curve to get started and its a little less cost effective

review_title: Monitor application servers using AppDynamics !
description: Best app monitoring application !
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Best application to monitor the application servers. Continues monitoring helps to understand the application behavior and outage of the application can be well predicted .
cons: The dashboard layout of the application statistics can be improved for better presentation .

review_title: APM that works for a premium
description: It does what it does some things well others not so - I particularly do not like ONLY email notification
author: Earl W.
pros: Product is easy to interface with - we have numerous monitors DB, Java, .Net and they work well
cons: Setup and configuration are sometimes a pain and usually involves support

review_title: AppDynamics is an excellent application performance monitoring and management tool
description: Its real-time monitoring, intelligent analytics, and user-friendly interface make it a must-have tool for any business looking to improve the performance of their applications.
author: Mukeshkumar J.
pros: AppDynamics provides real time monitoring. It is very useful for real-time visibility into application performance. We can quickly identify and resolve issues before they impact end-users. It is highly customizable and we can customize based on specific requirements and needs. We can also create custom alerts and dashboards as per requirments. AppDynamics is easy to use, with an intuitive interface and easy-to-understand charts and graphs that make it accessible even to non-technical users.
cons: It is a great tool but little expensive to use. Somewhat complex to setup and configure and may require technical expertise. AppDynamics requires significant computing resources, including memory and CPU, which can impact performance on smaller systems.

review_title: Great insights into application performance in real world conditions
description: Proactive management of software performance/ issues in production
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We started using AppDynamics in 2012 when we inherited code in production that was built by someone else. The level of insights it provided helped us address the production issues quickly and we started using it for all new development and deployment. It helped us move from being reactive to proactive in identifying and managing issues/ bottlenecks
cons: Like any complex piece of software it requires some learning. However, given the amount of information it generates out of the box it is easy for people not to make changes to configurations. That might result in more noise than news

review_title: Skeptical at first and now speechless and client ecstatic!
description: One platform that allows you to view key metrics of any "online store/service" in one pane. In a digital economy now and more people embracing the "cloud", which comes at a premium......it's great to be able to "see" in real time not only your infrastructure performance but the performance of the users and the apps and allows you know EXACTLY where the change is needed. Which gives organizations the option of freeing up staff, thus freeing up "salary" and putting it back in their bottom line.
author: Shaun D S.
pros: Single pane viewing of what matters most. Simple click of a button and I can view infrastructure response, user "click thru" i.e. completes to weekly/monthly reporting taking only minutes instead of hours or days. We were able to view what percentage of users visited/clicked thru with device and time of day and able to see their drop point. Immediately saw a trend and got our app team on it and saw almost immediate uptick in customer completes/orders. What sold me was the agentless monitoring of the databases so we could actully see in real time what days/times we needed to apply additional CPU resources.
cons: I guess I really can't state a "plausible" con......the software goes above and beyond what we had envisioned and actually made everyone's duties easier to complete which we were able to turn reports and analytics around quicker.......so if I had to complain about something.....maybe the price??? But isn't always about "price".

review_title: AppDynamics
description: We use AppDynamics to monitor the performance of our servers and applications. It helps us to find the reasons for the slowdown in servers. Monitoring current servers was not enough for us. Appdynamics made it very easy to find the problem.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The user interface so everyone can understand. Especially the graphics showing the flow of network traffic between our various monitored servers is great.
cons: Learning all the features of the application can take time.
